name: Trial of the Rusted Keep
flavor: A quick sparring run — three rooms, paper-thin foes. (Playtest fixture.)

acts.narration: You push through the splintered gate. Beyond, straw dummies in rusted mail shamble forward — the keep is testing you.
You cross the mud where a garrison once drilled. More dummies rise, moving quicker now, blades notched but earnest.
You step into the rusted hall. On the dais, the old tourney armour drags itself upright and levels a bent lance at you.
